projectDescription: A Java learning repository covering Unit 2 OOP concepts: access modifiers, inheritance, polymorphism, abstract classes, and interfaces through hands-on workshop exercises.
keyFeatures: Access modifiers: public, private, protected — practical encapsulation patterns
Single inheritance with extends, constructor chaining via super()
Method overriding with @Override and runtime polymorphism
Abstract classes with abstract methods enforcing contracts
Common pitfalls: multiple class inheritance errors, private access in subclasses, overloading vs overriding
publicApiSurface: Empleado(nombre, salario) — T7: getSalario(), setSalario(), calcularBonoAnual(), aumentarSalario()
CuentaBancaria(numeroCuenta, saldoInicial, tipoCuenta) — depositar(), retirar(), transferir()
Utilidades — suma(), resta(), multiplicar(), dividir(), potencia(), raizCuadrada(), factorial(), esPrimo()
Vehiculo(marca, velocidadMaxima) — mostrarInfo(), getMarca() / Coche extends Vehiculo
Persona(nombre, edad) — mostrarDetalles(), saludar() / Estudiante, Profesor extends PersonaT10
Empleado(nombre, salario) — T8: calcularBono() / Gerente extends Empleado: supervisar(), calcularBono()
FiguraT11 (abstract) — calcularArea() / CirculoT11, RectanguloT11 extends FiguraT11
interface Volador — volar() / interface Nadador — nadar() / interface Cantante — cantar()
Ave implements Volador, Cantante / Pez implements Nadador, Respirador
